summary: Tested pincode validation for customer RFQ submission. All validation scenarios working correctly: invalid pincodes show red border + error message, valid pincodes show green checkmark, partial pincodes show format error, empty pincodes allowed (optional field). Submit button is correctly disabled when invalid pincode is entered - form submission is prevented.

issues: Submit button visual disabled state (opacity: 0.6) not clearly visible in the UI when invalid pincode is entered, although the button is functionally disabled

critical_code_review_comments: Pincode validation implementation is correct and complete
Good error handling - if API fails, allows submission (doesn't block user)
Submit button correctly disabled via disabled prop when invalid pincode entered
seed_data_creation: Added item to cart via Calculator for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pincode validation feature fully tested and working. Customer login -> Calculator -> Add to Cart -> Submit RFQ modal shows pincode validation field. Test pincodes: Invalid=123456, Valid=380015/411001

tested_features.feature: Add item to cart via Calculator
Invalid 6-digit pincode (123456) - red border and error message
Submit button disabled when invalid pincode entered
Form submission prevented with invalid pincode

invalid_pincode_123456.error_message: Invalid pincode. Please enter a valid Indian pincode.
